nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 69. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 85, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. South wind 15 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 68 overnight. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. High near 69, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. North northeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.
